title: Global Order Book connect Cardano DeFi to increase transaction

rationale.summary: Vote: NO. For this TreasuryWithdrawals (active), downside risk and/or weak safeguards outweighed demonstrated benefit in the current evidence set. Decisive reason: a material claim is unsupported — "Minswap Labs will serve as budget administrator for fund administration, milestone review, and accountability." — so cost or precedent may outweigh the benefit. Weighed against it: the proposal substantiates "The proposal requests 3,333,000 ADA total, consisting of 3,300,000 ADA for delivery and 33,000 ADA for a 1% budget administration fee." and clears the evidence gates. What would change this vote to YES: Provide independent evidence for: Minswap Labs will serve as budget administrator for fund administration, milestone review, and accountability; Provide milestone-gated disbursement. Residual uncertainty: Treasury flow signal is in stressed regime (total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals). Confidence context: score -0.12; confidence 75.0%.
rationale.summary_raw: Advisory model lean was -0.020 (display cap ±0.05) and had zero influence on the binding score: The proposal is aligned with public-benefit ecosystem growth and includes milestones, KPIs, security-review gates, reporting, and some return-of-value mechanics, but the requested amount is large and several central benefits remain proposer-asserted rather than evidenced in the document. A small cautionary nudge is justified because treasury stewardship and evidence quality should weigh ahead of plausible DeFi growth claims.
top_fixes: Provide independent evidence for: Minswap Labs will serve as budget administrator for fund administration, milestone review, and accountability.

sections.title: Intake
sections.conclusion: Baseline fields and source anchors establish whether the proposal can be reviewed at all.

sections.title: Claims and evidence
findings: Proposal document read by reasoning layer: yes

Requested: Treasury withdrawal to fund Dano Finance's DeFi Kernel registry/platform work, Spot Leverage Order Book, American Options Market-Making protocol, and Composable DeFi Transaction Builder SDK.
Recipient: Dano Finance, with Minswap Labs as budget administrator

Deliverables: Public DeFi Kernel registry website and submission process with compatibility requirements, metadata templates, documentation, onboarding, reports, and at least two compatible smart contract packages documented, DeFi Kernel-compatible Spot Leverage Order Book with protocol specification, testnet deployment, security review or audit, mainnet deployment, published script hashes/schemas, adoption reporting, and integration documentation, DeFi Kernel-compatible American Options Market-Making protocol with protocol specification, testnet deployment, security review or audit, mainnet deployment, published script hashes/schemas, adoption reporting, and integration documentation, Composable DeFi Transaction Builder SDK with registry schema reader, metadata parser, discovery helpers, transaction construction helpers, protocol adapters, examples, tests, public documentation, package distribution, integration support, and final report
Claim (economic, supported_in_proposal, high materiality): The proposal requests 3,333,000 ADA total, consisting of 3,300,000 ADA for delivery and 33,000 ADA for a 1% budget administration fee.
Claim (governance, proposer_asserted, high materiality): Minswap Labs will serve as budget administrator for fund administration, milestone review, and accountability.

Claim (technical, supported_in_proposal, high materiality): Dano Finance will deliver four work packages: DeFi Kernel registry, Spot Leverage Order Book, American Options Protocol, and Composable DeFi Transaction Builder SDK.

Claim (technical, proposer_asserted, medium materiality): The DeFi Kernel is intended to be an open, fee-free, royalty-free compatibility standard for permissionless, composable, and discoverable Cardano DeFi contracts.
Claim (adoption, independently_verifiable, high materiality): Dano Finance currently has approximately USD 18M in TVL and more than 10,000 on-chain transactions.

Claim (technical, supported_in_proposal, high materiality): The Spot Leverage Order Book and American Options Protocol will each require security review or audit before mainnet release, with critical unresolved security issues blocking affected mainnet milestones.
missing: Independent evidence for: Minswap Labs will serve as budget administrator for fund administration, milestone review, and accountability.
Independent evidence for: The DeFi Kernel is intended to be an open, fee-free, royalty-free compatibility standard for permissionless, composable, and discoverable Cardano DeFi contracts.

Independent evidence for: The proposal claims the funded work will improve Cardano DeFi discoverability, composability, liquidity depth, developer experience, risk-management markets, and recurring on-chain activity.
sections.conclusion: Each claim must map to replayable public evidence; proposer assertions alone are not enough for confidence.

sections.title: Treasury analysis
findings: Six-month treasury flow regime: stressed (basis: total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals)
sections.conclusion: Treasury votes require a higher bar because they consume shared ADA and create precedent.

sections.title: Risk review
sections.conclusion: Risk is not a side note; unmitigated execution or governance risk can dominate an otherwise attractive proposal.

sections.title: Counterargument pass
findings: Strongest YES: the proposal substantiates "The proposal requests 3,333,000 ADA total, consisting of 3,300,000 ADA for delivery and 33,000 ADA for a 1% budget administration fee." and clears the evidence gates.

Strongest NO: a material claim is unsupported — "Minswap Labs will serve as budget administrator for fund administration, milestone review, and accountability." — so cost or precedent may outweigh the benefit.
Strongest hold: if claims cannot be tied to replayable evidence, abstaining avoids overclaiming certainty.
sections.conclusion: A defensible rationale must show the best opposing case before it reaches a vote.

sections.title: Synthesis
findings: Final vote must be derived from completed sections above, not from a prose summary.
The public rationale should name the decisive section and the strongest counterargument.
sections.conclusion: The vote is only credible if the assessment tree shows enough work for a skeptical delegator to audit.

affirmative_waste_evidence: independently verified excessive cost versus market comparables
missing: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity

decision_contract.composite_formula: 40% ecosystem benefit + 25% delivery confidence + 20% cost efficiency + 15% downside protection - 0.50
decision_contract.benefit_formula: 18% critical infrastructure + 8% open source + 15% adoption + 12% ecosystem leverage + 10% strategic necessity + 10% prior delivery + 10% established service + 8% builder dependency + 5% low substitutability + 4% non-funding disruption risk
decision_contract.yes_rule: All quality floors, independently verified evidence, verified NCL, and portfolio capacity must pass.
decision_contract.no_rule: Requires affirmative independently verified waste/harm plus ecosystem benefit below 55%; missing evidence alone is never NO.
decision_contract.portfolio_gate: Verified on-chain Net Change Limit and opportunity-cost portfolio eligibility are mandatory for treasury direction.

affirmative_waste_evidence: independently verified excessive cost versus market comparables
missing: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity

decision_contract.merit_reason: Affirmative independent waste/harm evidence outweighs demonstrated benefit.
decision_contract.execution_note: Merit is evaluated independently; the executable recommendation also requires verified NCL and portfolio capacity.

flags.detail: Treasury withdrawal to a single address

treasury_capacity.caveat: Set by an Info governance action. Info actions change no ledger state and can NEVER be enacted -- they always expire -- so no formally ratified NCL exists or can exist. This is the strongest available public chain evidence: an anchor document byte-verified against its on-chain blake2b-256 hash, covering the current epoch, which won a majority of participating DRep stake. It is NOT enacted ledger state, and the majority may fall short of the supermajority other action types require. Published with every treasury rationale that relies on it.
